description_long: This object is a classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) console, characterized by its rectangular, gray plastic body with a black stripe and red accent buttons on the front. The front panel features a cartridge slot, two red rectangular buttons for power and reset, and controller ports. A long, black cable extends from one of the controller ports, ending in a rectangular connector typical of NES controllers. The top and sides of the console are smooth, with subtle venting details on the top surface. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, with a retro aesthetic that is instantly recognizable to video game enthusiasts. The object is primarily made of plastic, with some internal metal components and wiring implied by its function.
description: A classic gray Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) console with a long black controller cable and red accent buttons on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the NES console's cartridge slot, two red buttons, and the attached controller cable.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the console and the cable extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel and the full length of the controller cable.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the cable's extension and the console's rectangular shape.
